title: diversified_address returns (DI, String) not just String — prevents address reuse class
description: The naive implementation would return Result<String>. Returning (DiversifierIndex, String) means callers know the actual found DI and can advance their state to found_di+1, not start+1. Without this, callers using a simple integer counter would silently produce address collisions whenever Sapling skips an invalid diversifier (~50% density). A future contributor might suggest 'simplify the return type to just the address string' to reduce the API surface. Resist: the DI value is the state that must survive between calls, and returning it is what makes the system correct.
close_reason: Resolved by nie-cs0.5: diversified_address now returns (u128, String) so callers advance to found_di+1, not start+1. Rationale stands.
